questionHtml: Evaluate the hypothesis that females prefer to mate with males whose feathers are a brighter blue.
markschemeHtml:
Strengths:
a. (slight) increase in mate choice at higher male brightness index;

Weaknesses:
b. dots are scattered without a trend/no clear correlation
OR
most females choose mates around normal (brightness);

c. insufficient data/information provided;

Allow any other data-based statement.

meta.title: Evaluate the hypothesis that females prefer to mate with males whose feathers are a brighter blue.
